paragraphs.source: MediaTek, as a custom ASIC design house, is working to integrate CPO capabilities into its design platform. They aim to offer PIC/EIC designs that can work seamless with their custom accelerators. They think that at 200G-per-lane generation, NPC (Near-Packaged Copper) can be an effective solution with fiber pitches >900 µm; as data rates rise to the 200-300G range, CPC with denser pitches >400 µm may become preferrable. However, once speeds reach 400G-per-lane or higher, moving toward CPO architecture – with even denser fiber pitches at ~130 µm and more compact interconnect IPs – will likely be necessary.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: MediaTek, as a custom ASIC design house, is working to integrate CPO capabilities into its design platform. They think that at 200G-per-lane generation, NPC (Near-Packaged Copper) can be an effective solution with fiber pitches >900 µm; as data rates rise to the 200-300G range, CPC with denser pitches >400 µm may become preferrable. However, once speeds reach 400G-per-lane or higher, moving toward CPO architecture – with even denser fiber pitches at ~130 µm and more compact interconnect IPs – will likely be necessary.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: MediaTek, as a custom ASIC design house, is working to integrate CPO capabilities into its design platform. They aim to offer PIC/EIC designs that can work seamless with their custom accelerators. They think that at 200G-per-lane generation, NPC (Near-Packaged Copper) can be an effective solution with fiber pitches >900 µm; as data rates rise to the 200-300G range, CPC with denser pitches >400 µm may become preferrable. However, once speeds reach 400G-per-lane or higher, moving toward CPO architecture – with even denser fiber pitches at ~130 µm and more compact interconnect IPs – will likely be necessary.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

作为定制ASIC设计公司的联发科，正将共封装光学（CPO）能力融入其设计平台。他们计划提供可与其定制加速器无缝协同的PIC/EIC设计方案。联发科认为，在200G每通道世代，近封装铜互连（NPC）在光纤间距大于900 µm时可作为有效解决方案；而随着数据速率提升至200-300G范围，采用更密集光纤间距（大于400 µm）的共封装铜互连（CPC）可能更为合适。不过，一旦速率达到400G每通道或更高，很可能有必要转向共封装光学（CPO）架构。该架构可将光纤间距进一步缩小至约130 µm，并采用更为紧凑的互连IP。

issues.description: NPC术语翻译与提供的术语表不一致
CPC为未在术语表中定义的新缩写，未进行任何注释
句子过长且使用破折号嵌套，保留了明显的英文句法投影，读起来不够顺畅
程度词力度调整不当，将原文推测性语气部分升级
存在轻微翻译腔，“正致力于...整合到...中”可更自然
分号连接的并列句逻辑衔接可更丰富
